---
name: 🐛 Bug Fix
about: For patches and hotfixes addressing specific application errors.
title: "[BUG]: "
labels: ["type:bug", "status:needs-review"]
assignees: ["Joyal-George-KJ"]
---

## 💡 What does this PR do?
Fixes/Addresses: #<ISSUE_NUMBER>

## ✅ Verification Steps (How to ensure the Issue is fixed)

### 🩹 Bug Fix Specific Checks
- [ ] **No Regression:** I have checked that this fix did not break existing features.
- [ ] **Tests:** A new failing test has been added and subsequently passed to prevent recurrence.
- [ ] **Reproduction:** I have confirmed the original issue can no longer be reproduced.


---

## 🔍 PR Checklist: Quality & Standards

### 🛡️ Project Governance & Conduct
- [ ] I have read and followed the **[Code of Conduct](CODE_OF_CONDUCT.md)** and **[CONTRIBUTING.md](CONTRIBUTING.md)**.
- [ ] I have verified that **no other open PR or Issue exists** that addresses this exact problem.

### ⚙️ General Code & Build Checks
- [ ] **Conventional Commit:** The PR title follows the `[TYPE]: Subject` format.
- [ ] **Type Check & Linting:** Code is passing TypeScript validation and all quality checks.
- [ ] **Dependencies:** New packages (if any) are justified and installed correctly.

## 🖼️ Screenshots/Visuals (if applicable)
